title: Hammer of Gravity
description: Hammer of gravity is a weapon in the Minecraft Dungeons.I added it to Minecraft.
body:
Hammer of gravity is a weapon in the Minecraft Dungeons. I added it to Minecraft. It have nine attack damage,but its attack speed is low. It can attack the mobs within the range of damage. It can also pulls mobs in range toward's the weapon's impact point. The way you obtain it is to kill the ender dragon. It will appear in the center of The End.
﻿
